top_signals.title: SEC Mulls New ETF Rules as $16T Boom Disrupts Status Quo
top_signals.summary: Bloomberg's Isabelle Lee joins Scarlet Fu, Katie Greifeld, and Eric Balchunas on "Bloomberg ETF IQ." The SEC is signaling a potential rethink of how it oversees ETFs after a recent wave of filings for prediction-market ETFs prompted fresh scrutiny of the existing regulatory framework.  (Source: Bloomberg)
top_signals.why_it_matters: Digital asset volatility and institutional crypto positioning changes.
